name: Size does matter? (ALT)
description:
Step into my lecture hall. Leave your ego at the door.

In this session, we will dissect more than diagrams—we will examine identity, insecurity, and the anatomy of perception itself. Yes, we’ll explore the male body in reproductive context. Yes, we will confront the question society whispers but never answers honestly:

Does size matter?

Not in jest. Not in rumor.
But through data, psychology, and brutal honesty.

You are not here to be entertained.
You are here to be stripped of illusions.

Watch. Listen. Think.
If you're brave enough, participate
creator: D@n
